hero.title: Interview Coach
hero.description: Practice interviews and review feedback to improve future responses.

differences.description: Interview Coach centers preparation on practicing responses and reviewing feedback.

items.title: Interview practice
items.description: Work through interview responses before the real conversation.

items.title: Response feedback
items.description: Review feedback connected to the practice response.

items.title: Focused improvement
items.description: Use the feedback to shape the next response.

feel.title: A repeatable preparation loop
feel.description: The workflow keeps interview practice and feedback connected.

items.title: Review the feedback
items.description: Consider what could be clearer or stronger.

items.title: Try again
items.description: Use the feedback in the next practice response.

audiences.title: Who uses Interview Coach
audiences.description: Useful for people preparing for interviews.

items.title: Students
items.description: Prepare for internships and entry-level opportunities.

groupedSection.description: Move from response practice toward focused improvement.

items.name: Retry
items.description: Apply the guidance in another attempt.
